title: Content-addressed permanent preview-assets store + manual Cleanup GC + reuse video/audio
description: Architecture refactor: preview-assets become a SHA-256 content-addressed, deduped, PERMANENT store (Media/.preview-assets/<sha256>.<ext>). Fixes the root that MPI-225 only band-aided: a reused frame 404s the next gen because deleting a card removes its .preview-assets/<itemId>/ folder. New model: (1) content-addressed flat store, one file per unique content (100 reuses = 1 file); (2) NO auto-delete of the store on card delete/replace â€” only a NEW manual Cleanup command (projects-page context menu -> MpiOkCancel confirm) wipes it; (3) one-time migration on project load flattens+dedups existing per-item folders + rewrites sidecar refs; (4) Reuse dialog gains Use Video + Use Audio toggles; (5) soft-fail net downgraded to warning toast. No refcounting needed (nothing auto-deletes). Latents stay separate (not reuse assets). 4-agent investigation complete; full surface map in research/surface-map.md. Extends MPI-225 (keep its fixes); MPI-226 (loop/save-race) stays separate.
